title: Macario
writer: B. Traven, Emilio Carballido, Roberto Gavaldón
actors: Ignacio López Tarso, Pina Pellicer, Enrique Lucero
plot: Poor and hungry peasant Macario wishes to have a good meal for All Saint's Day. After his wife cooks him a turkey he has three apparitions: The Devil, God, and the Death.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
